link.title: Pair Govee Smart Plug
link.description: Short-press the button on the plug once now, then click Submit. On newer firmware the plug only releases its pairing token for a few seconds after a short button press, so press it just before submitting (you have about 30 seconds).

init.description: Configure polling options. Status updates from BLE advertisements will always work regardless of this setting.

error.linking: Failed to pair, please try again

abort.no_devices_found: No devices found on the network
